source_pr.title: driver.go & interpreter: remove driver.go and interpreter.go
source_pr.body:
This commit 
1. removes driver.go and interpreter
2. rewrite the tests which use TiDB driver.
PTAL @coocood @shenli @zimulala @hanfei1991

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: driver.go & interpreter: remove driver.go and interpreter.go.
fix_pattern: driver.go & interpreter: remove driver.go and interpreter.go

evidence: files: Makefile, ddl/ddl_db_test.go, driver.go, interpreter/main.go, perfschema/perfschema_test.go, tidb_test.go
